overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a luxurious, rain-soaked rooftop pool area in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The player passes equipment cases, encounters an NPC in a white suit, navigates around illuminated water features, and approaches a sleek black Mizutani sports car before entering it.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop pool deck with equipment storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet poolside path past large equipment cases

entered.detail: large black equipment crates with white text branding stacked on the grass
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky
rectangular water feature with illuminated edges reflecting the rain
modern building with purple neon lighting visible in the background
wooden lounge chair on the grass near the equipment cases

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked luxury rooftop pool deck at night. The camera moves forward past large equipment cases on the left, with an infinity pool reflecting lights on the right. Palm trees line the area and a modern building with purple lights glows in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central pool deck with water features and city views

events.description: character in white suit comes into view standing by the pool edge

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a character standing near the water feature

notable_agents.action: character in white suit standing still near the pool edge holding a weapon

entered.detail: tall industrial communication tower with red lights visible in the distance
floating spherical drone with red glowing light hovering near the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the central pool area where a character in a white suit stands near the water's edge. A tall communication tower and floating drone become visible against the night sky. The equipment cases and bench fall behind as the path opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pool walkway with illuminated edges

events.description: camera turns right to follow the curved path around the water features

agents.ego_description: navigating around the curved pool edge, turning toward the illuminated stairs

entered.detail: large leafy tree with dense foliage near the pool edge
wide staircase with green illuminated steps leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to follow the curved walkway around the water features. The character and drone exit view as the path reveals a large tree and illuminated green stairs in the distance. The infinity pool shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper pool deck with vehicle parking and city skyline

events.description: sleek black sports car comes into view parked on the deck
camera approaches and enters the driver's side door of the car

agents.ego_description: approaching the black sports car and entering the driver's seat

notable_agents.action: black Mizutani sports car parked on the wet pool deck with gold wheels

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with bright neon signage visible in the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the upper deck where a sleek black Mizutani sports car is parked. Futuristic neon-lit towers rise in the distant city skyline. The camera moves around the vehicle and enters the driver's side door, concluding with a view of the car's interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement across a rain-soaked luxury rooftop that transitions from a poolside lounge into a high-end parking area. It begins by gliding past large equipment cases and an infinity pool reflecting the purple glow of a distant modern building. As the camera advances through the central deck, the path opens up to reveal a character in a white suit standing near the water's edge beneath a towering communication tower and a floating drone. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right to follow a curved walkway, leaving the character behind and moving past illuminated green stairs while the pool slides to the left of the frame. Finally, the movement leads toward the upper deck where a sleek black Mizutani sports car is parked against a skyline of neon-lit towers, ending as the camera moves around the vehicle and enters the driver's side door.
